TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == trakis == ana nanu ywaw pciywagun ga, skahul nha qba ki yabux hnoqil mciywaw, nanu yasa thway ru mqsuqi pintiywaw nha. Sikishnga ryax na pinyugan kwara pinqumah ru qmasuq ywaw nha, s'agal nha gaga na msbayux, ini ga sp'yuw nha qinyatanmwah prraw mciywaw. trakis hkil hiya ga, skbalay nha hkil sa. nanu
S.PHON: == trakis~…ē == ana nanu jwaw p ¶~ ®ijwa…£un …£a, s~…ēkańßul nńßa qő≤a ki jaő≤ux ńßnoqil m ¶~ ®ijwaw, nanu jas~…ēa tńßwaj ru mqs~…ēuqi pintijwaw nńßa. s~…ēikis~…ēńßŇča rjax na pinju…£an kwara pinqumańß ru qmas~…ēuq jwaw nńßa, s~…ē Ēa…£al nńßa …£a…£a na ms~…ēő≤ajux, ini …£a s~…ēp Ējuw nńßa qinjatanmwańß prraw m ¶~ ®ijwaw. trakis~…ē ńßkil ńßija …£a, s~…ēkő≤alaj nńßa ńßkil s~…ēa. nanu
S.FORM: == trakis == ana nanu ywaw pciywagun ga, skahul nha qba ki yabux hnoqil mciywaw, nanu yasa thway ru mqsuqi pintiywaw nha. Sikishnga ryax na pinyugan kwara pinqumah ru qmasuq ywaw nha, s'agal nha gaga na msbayux, ini ga sp'yuw nha qinyatanmwah prraw mciywaw. trakis hkil hiya ga, skbalay nha hkil sa. nanu
